scripts.workspace:check: bun run --cwd=protocol check && bun run --cwd=api check && bun run --cwd=appview verify
scripts.workspace:build: bun run --cwd=protocol build && bun run --cwd=api build && bun run --cwd=appview build
scripts.workspace:test: bun run --cwd=protocol test && bun run --cwd=api test && bun run --cwd=appview test
